text: Bag of Endless Gold
power: Never run out of currency for in-game purchases.

text: Play Button
power: Skip a challenging puzzle or obstacle.

text: Heart of Compassion
power: Heal yourself or a friend to full health.

text: Ephemeral Butterfly
power: Grants you the ability to understand animals for one day.

text: Melodic Note
power: Play a tune to unlock hidden doors and pathways.

text: Friendly Robot
power: A mechanical companion that can solve any math puzzle for you.

text: Globe of Unity
power: Instantly learn and speak any language fluently for 24 hours.

text: Community Emblem
power: Summon a helpful NPC to aid you in your quest.

text: Handshake of Trust
power: Win over any NPC to your side, no matter their initial disposition.

text: Microscope of Insight
power: Reveal hidden details and clues in your environment.

text: Alien Communicator
power: Speak with extraterrestrials and maybe even summon a UFO.

text: Potion of Randomness
power: Drink to experience a completely unpredictable effect.

text: Time-Loop Pocket Watch
power: Rewind time by 5 minutes, but only once.

text: Dreamcatcher Hat
power: Capture and interact with your dreams.

text: Schrodinger's Box
power: Open the box to find out if you gain a life or lose one.

text: Infinite Acorn
power: Plant it to grow a tree that reaches into another dimension.

text: Book of Unwritten Stories
power: Read to enter a story where you're the protagonist, but you can't predict the plot.

text: Thundercloud in a Jar
power: Release to cause a localized storm, complete with lightning.

text: Gravity-Reversing Gloves
power: Flip gravity for yourself for a short period.

text: Reality Distortion Boombox
power: Play a tune to temporarily alter the laws of physics.

text: Impenetrable Cape
power: Block any physical attack once per day.

text: Cowl of Perception
power: See through walls for 10 seconds.

text: Speedster's Boots
power: Run at super speed for a short burst.

text: Gloves of Strength
power: Lift heavy objects effortlessly.

text: Wings of Flight
power: Fly for up to 5 minutes.

text: Flame-Resistant Suit
power: Become immune to fire damage.

text: Utility Belt
power: Access a random useful gadget.

text: Healing Emblem
power: Instantly heal minor injuries.

text: Voice Amplifier
power: Your voice can be heard clearly in a 1-mile radius.

text: Identity Mask
power: Conceal your true identity from anyone.

text: Web-Slinger
power: Shoot webs to swing between buildings.

text: Aqua Breather
power: Breathe underwater indefinitely.

text: Detective's Lens
power: Instantly analyze a crime scene.

text: Cosmic Shield
power: Deflect energy-based attacks.

text: Telepathic Tiara
power: Read the thoughts of one person for 10 seconds.

text: Dr. Eliza Dolittle's Ring
power: Let's you talk to animals

text: coffee
power: doubles speed

text: you turn in to butterfly
power: game ends and you rome the land being a butterfly

text: Rainbow Butterfly — A bright AMI emblem carried by supporters of Anti-Malaria Intelligence, created to spark hope, visibility, and fundraising for the fight against malaria.
power: Represents AMI, the Anti-Malaria Intelligence. In story play, it can inspire allies, open charity or public-good conversations, and mark the bearer as someone working to raise funds and awareness against malaria.
label: Rainbow Butterfly

text: Time Travel — You can move through time, but every change creates consequences.
power: Enables visits to past or future scenes, timeline repairs, paradoxes, and irreversible choices.
label: Time Travel

text: Full Fourth Wall Break — You know this is a story and can sometimes push back against the narrator.
power: Allows meta-awareness, narrative resistance, genre-savvy choices, and direct conflict with story structure.
label: Full Fourth Wall Break

text: God-Touched Shapeshifter — You can become almost anything: beast, person, shadow, storm, or myth.
power: Grants near-limitless transformation potential with divine consequences and identity risk.
label: God-Touched Shapeshifter

text: Absolute Luck — Reality twists to keep you alive, successful, and surrounded by chaos.
power: Turns catastrophe into advantage, bends coincidence, and makes probability visibly nervous.
label: Absolute Luck

text: Absolute Curse — Catastrophe follows you, but it also destroys your enemies, chains, and limits.
power: Weaponizes misfortune into world-breaking chaos, collapsing obstacles through terrible coincidence.
label: Absolute Curse

text: True Resurrection — You can return from death, or bring back someone whose story is unfinished.
power: Restores life across impossible boundaries, forcing fate, grief, and cosmic law to respond.
label: True Resurrection

text: World-Eating Vampirism — Your hunger can drain cities, armies, memories, or gods.
power: Turns vampiric hunger into a cosmic force capable of stealing strength, life, and history.
label: World-Eating Vampirism

text: Moon-God Lycanthropy — The beast inside you is divine, ancient, and worshipped.
power: Grants sacred lunar transformation, pack dominion, divine wrath, and mythic beast identity.
label: Moon-God Lycanthropy

text: Prime Dragon Companion — An elder dragon treats you as family and may reshape kingdoms for you.
power: Adds a world-class dragon ally whose affection can alter politics, war, treasure, and destiny.
label: Prime Dragon Companion

text: Author’s Favorite — Coincidence, drama, and narrative timing bend around your choices.
power: Creates story-favored timing, unlikely survival, dramatic entrances, and suspiciously perfect plot turns.
label: Author’s Favorite

text: Soul Twin — You and your twin are two bodies of one cosmic soul.
power: Enables shared destiny, soul resonance, cross-distance awareness, and mythic twin sacrifice.
label: Soul Twin

text: Living Paradox — You should not exist, and reality keeps trying to correct that.
power: Creates timeline instability, impossible memories, paradox immunity, and reality-level danger.
label: Living Paradox

text: Final True Love — Love becomes a cosmic force capable of breaking curses, wars, and timelines.
power: Turns devotion into world-shaping power that can resist fate, heal ruin, and defy apocalypse.
label: Final True Love

text: Death’s Personal Enemy — Death knows your name and has failed too many times.
power: Lets the character resist endings, bargain with mortality, and become a problem for cosmic order.
label: Death’s Personal Enemy

text: Rewrite the Scene — Once in a great moment, you can alter what just happened.
power: Allows one dramatic revision of a scene outcome, changing failure, loss, betrayal, or disaster at a cost.
label: Rewrite the Scene

text: Teleportation — You can jump across space to places you know, love, or fear.
power: Allows instant relocation, daring escapes, impossible rescues, and dangerous misjudged arrivals.
label: Teleportation

text: Greater Vampirism — You are an ancient predator with charm, immortality, and terrible appetites.
power: Grants supernatural charm, night dominance, regeneration, predatory senses, and deep moral peril.
label: Greater Vampirism

text: Alpha Lycanthropy — Your wolf curse commands packs, fear, and primal power.
power: Enables pack influence, terrifying transformation, primal senses, and dominance over lesser beasts.
label: Alpha Lycanthropy

text: Dragon Rider — A full-grown dragon accepts you as rider, partner, or tolerated burden.
power: Grants aerial travel, overwhelming presence, dragonfire stakes, and a powerful bond with a proud creature.
label: Dragon Rider

text: Chosen One — Prophecy keeps bending events around you, whether you asked for it or not.
power: Creates destiny-driven protection, escalating trials, symbolic enemies, and impossible expectations.
label: Chosen One

text: Immortal Beloved — True love ties your soul to another across death, distance, and time.
power: Strengthens love-based quests, soul-bond rescues, death-defying loyalty, and tragic resilience.
label: Immortal Beloved

text: Mythic Twin — Your identical twin is cosmically linked to you, sharing fate, wounds, dreams, or power.
power: Creates twin-based resonance, shared visions, mirrored danger, and powerful emotional stakes.
label: Mythic Twin

text: Arch-Henchman — Your right-hand lieutenant is terrifyingly competent and loyal for mysterious reasons.
power: Provides elite support, strategic backup, dangerous errands, and a follower with their own legend.
label: Arch-Henchman

text: Invisible Master — You can vanish from sight while moving, fighting, or escaping.
power: Enables advanced stealth, ambushes, escapes, unseen rescues, and terrifying entrances.
label: Invisible Master

text: Voice of Command — Your words can halt mobs, rally armies, or break weak wills.
power: Carries supernatural authority in crisis, leadership, intimidation, and battlefield command.
label: Voice of Command

text: Phoenix Survival — Death burns you down, but you may rise again changed.
power: Allows miraculous return after apparent defeat, with transformation, scars, and new consequences.
label: Phoenix Survival

text: World-Famous Villainy — Everyone knows your crimes, even if some of them were misunderstandings.
power: Creates fearsome reputation, instant recognition, criminal leverage, and heroes hunting you.
label: World-Famous Villainy

text: Saintlike Calm — Your peace can stop violence, weaken fear, and shame monsters into listening.
power: Radiates powerful calm that de-escalates conflict, steadies allies, and challenges cruelty.
label: Saintlike Calm

text: Living Weapon — Your body, soul, or blood carries an ancient battle-purpose.
power: Makes the character a dangerous artifact of war, unlocking hidden combat power and old enemies.
label: Living Weapon

text: Fate’s Favorite Problem — Destiny protects you because it clearly has plans.
power: Creates improbable survival, narrative timing, prophetic attention, and constant cosmic interference.
label: Fate’s Favorite Problem

text: Filthy Rich — You have money, properties, lawyers, debts, enemies, and influence.
power: Provides access to resources, bribes, elite spaces, hired help, financial leverage, and wealthy complications.
label: Filthy Rich

text: Private Henchman Squad — A small team of loyal followers can guard, scout, intimidate, or botch things spectacularly.
power: Grants a reusable crew for backup, errands, crowd control, distractions, and messy tactical support.
label: Private Henchman Squad

text: Monster Pet — You have a dangerous exotic companion such as a basilisk, griffin, owlbear, or mini-kraken.
power: Adds a powerful creature ally for combat, travel, intimidation, and constant containment problems.
label: Monster Pet

text: Public Hero — People recognize you, cheer for you, and expect you to solve impossible problems.
power: Creates fame, public trust, pressure, favors, expectations, and enemies who want symbolic victories.
label: Public Hero

text: Secret Royal Blood — Your ancestry creates claims, enemies, alliances, and prophecy trouble.
power: Unlocks noble intrigue, inheritance disputes, hidden legitimacy, loyalists, assassins, and political leverage.
label: Secret Royal Blood

text: Master Shapeshifter — You can copy people, beasts, or strange forms with convincing detail.
power: Enables advanced infiltration, escape, impersonation, survival adaptations, and identity-based story twists.
label: Master Shapeshifter

text: Unkillable Until Proven Otherwise — You survive things that should absolutely end you.
power: Provides absurd endurance, cinematic survival, cliffhanger resilience, and rumors that death avoids you.
label: Unkillable Until Proven Otherwise

text: Cult Following — A devoted group believes you are chosen, cursed, divine, or extremely marketable.
power: Creates followers, resources, rumors, rituals, social pressure, and alarming misunderstandings.
label: Cult Following

text: Demonic Patron — A powerful entity backs you, helps you, and keeps the receipts.
power: Grants dark favors, forbidden leverage, supernatural aid, and dangerous obligations.
label: Demonic Patron

text: Angelic Patron — A radiant power protects you while expecting inconvenient moral choices.
power: Provides holy support, protection, guidance, healing moments, and difficult ethical pressure.
label: Angelic Patron

text: Reality Glitch — Small errors in the world happen around you, sometimes to your advantage.
power: Causes strange coincidences, visual anomalies, skipped moments, impossible shortcuts, and broken assumptions.
label: Reality Glitch

text: Perfect Double Life — You maintain two identities so well that both have friends, enemies, and obligations.
power: Unlocks social infiltration, secret resources, alternate reputations, and escalating identity conflicts.
label: Perfect Double Life

text: Doomed Romance — Love gives you strength, but fate keeps sharpening the knife.
power: Creates emotional stakes, dramatic sacrifices, impossible choices, and romance-driven courage.
label: Doomed Romance

text: Battle Trance — In danger, you enter a focused state where fear and hesitation vanish.
power: Improves crisis action, combat focus, pain tolerance, and decisive movement under pressure.
label: Battle Trance

text: Legendary Bandmate — Your music can rally crowds, disrupt magic, and start revolutions.
power: Turns performance into power, inspiring allies, shaking enemies, and transforming public mood.
label: Legendary Bandmate

text: Pet Dragon — A young dragon companion: proud, hungry, dangerous, and deeply attached.
power: Can fly, intimidate, sniff treasure, breathe small bursts of elemental trouble, and demand snacks.
label: Pet Dragon

text: Shape Changing — You can change your form, though emotions, injuries, or moonlight may affect it.
power: Allows disguise, escape, infiltration, strange travel, and dramatic identity complications.
label: Shape Changing

text: Extremely Lucky — Fate favors you dramatically, but the backlash can be just as dramatic.
power: Turns impossible odds into sudden openings while attracting coincidence, attention, and cosmic debt.
label: Extremely Lucky

text: Extremely Unlucky — Disaster follows you, yet somehow opens impossible paths.
power: Creates chaos that ruins plans, exposes secrets, breaks barriers, and sometimes saves the day sideways.
label: Extremely Unlucky

text: Lupus: Lycanthropy — A werewolf curse grants strength, senses, and dangerous moonlit transformations.
power: Provides primal senses, ferocity, tracking, intimidation, and a risky beast form tied to the moon.
label: Lupus: Lycanthropy

text: Vampirism — You gain night power, charm, and hunger, with sunlight and morality becoming problems.
power: Grants predatory charm, night senses, resilience, and blood-driven complications.
label: Vampirism

text: Zombie — You are undead, hard to kill, emotionally complicated, and difficult to explain at dinner.
power: Provides unnatural endurance, fear immunity, strange survival, and awkward social consequences.
label: Zombie

text: Radioactive Spider Bite — You gain wall-crawling reflexes, strange senses, and unwanted responsibility.
power: Enables climbing, danger-sense moments, agile saves, and heroic complications caused by new power.
label: Radioactive Spider Bite

text: Fourth Wall Awareness — You sometimes notice patterns in the story itself.
power: Can sense narrative danger, suspicious coincidences, obvious plot hooks, and recurring dramatic structure.
label: Fourth Wall Awareness

text: Psychic Hunch — You get flashes of danger, emotion, and hidden truth.
power: Provides brief intuitive warnings, emotional reads, and clue flashes when the story tightens.
label: Psychic Hunch

text: Ghost Friend — A spirit companion advises, haunts, spies, and refuses to move on.
power: Can observe hidden places, recognize spirits, whisper warnings, and complicate emotional closure.
label: Ghost Friend

text: Criminal Reputation — The underworld knows your name and may help or hunt you.
power: Opens black-market contacts, old debts, shady favors, intimidation, and dangerous recognition.
label: Criminal Reputation

text: Forbidden Talent — You can do one illegal, cursed, or impossible thing very well.
power: Adds a powerful specialty that solves hard problems while attracting suspicion, law, or curses.
label: Forbidden Talent

text: Living Lie Detector — Falsehoods feel wrong in your bones.
power: Can sense deception, half-truths, and concealed intent, though interpretation may still be tricky.
label: Living Lie Detector

text: Fated Rival — A recurring enemy mirrors you, challenges you, and keeps making things personal.
power: Creates a persistent antagonist who drives growth, reveals weaknesses, and escalates story stakes.
label: Fated Rival

text: Pet Raven — A clever bird that scouts, mimics words, and steals shiny evidence.
power: Can scout from above, repeat overheard phrases, carry small objects, and create eerie distractions.
label: Pet Raven

text: Pet Snake — A calm exotic companion that senses heat, danger, and nervous people.
power: Can slip into tight spaces, detect warmth, intimidate strangers, and quietly warn of nearby movement.
label: Pet Snake

text: Henchman — A loyal but questionably competent follower helps carry gear, threaten rivals, and complicate plans.
power: Provides backup in social pressure, errands, intimidation, carrying supplies, and comedic tactical mistakes.
label: Henchman

text: Minor Invisibility — You can turn partly invisible while still, quiet, and not panicking.
power: Helps hide in dim corners, avoid casual notice, escape simple searches, or stage eerie appearances.
label: Minor Invisibility

text: Idiot Savant — You are brilliant at one strange field and wildly unreliable outside it.
power: Can solve obscure problems, decode niche patterns, or produce sudden brilliance at inconvenient moments.
label: Idiot Savant

text: Second Personality — Another self inside you has different instincts, memories, or talents.
power: Creates internal conflict and alternate approaches, sometimes revealing skills or knowledge the main self lacks.
label: Second Personality

text: Fairy Helper — A tiny magical assistant gives advice, pranks enemies, and makes everything legally worse.
power: Can scout, distract, glow, whisper rumors, and meddle in bargains with unpredictable fairy logic.
label: Fairy Helper

text: True Love — Someone matters so much that courage, sacrifice, and bad decisions become easier.
power: Can inspire heroic resolve, unlock emotional choices, resist despair, and complicate every dangerous plan.
label: True Love

text: Buddhist Peace — You stay calm under threat and radiate steadiness that can soothe others.
power: Helps resist intimidation, de-escalate conflict, steady allies, and remain unfazed by danger.
label: Buddhist Peace

text: Exotic Pet Monkey — A nimble companion that climbs, distracts, steals, and embarrasses nobles.
power: Can reach high places, snatch small items, mimic behavior, and create chaos in formal settings.
label: Exotic Pet Monkey

text: Con Artist’s Smile — You can bluff your way through doors, debts, and suspicious guards.
power: Improves social deception, misdirection, fake confidence, and fast exits from awkward questions.
label: Con Artist’s Smile

text: Occult Hobbyist — You know just enough forbidden lore to be useful and not enough to be safe.
power: Can identify symbols, rituals, spirits, cursed objects, and exactly the wrong book to open.
label: Occult Hobbyist

text: Animal Magnetism — Beasts, pets, and mounts tend to like you before people do.
power: Improves first contact with animals, calming mounts, avoiding bites, and earning creature trust.
label: Animal Magnetism

text: Burner Identity — You maintain a backup name, outfit, papers, and reputation.
power: Provides cover for infiltration, escape, social maneuvering, and surviving reputation disasters.
label: Burner Identity

text: Suspiciously Charming — People want to trust you even when they absolutely should not.
power: Makes first impressions easier, buys time in tense conversations, and opens doors through charisma.
label: Suspiciously Charming

text: Pet Cat — A suspiciously clever cat follows you, notices hidden things, and judges everyone.
power: A loyal animal companion that can scout small spaces, notice suspicious movement, and create social complications in story scenes.
label: Pet Cat

text: Pet Rat — A loyal little scout that can slip into tiny spaces and steal crumbs or keys.
power: Can sneak through vents, under doors, and behind shelves to retrieve small objects, scout danger, or cause a timely distraction.
label: Pet Rat

text: Identical Twin — Somewhere nearby, someone looks exactly like you. Useful, confusing, and dangerous.
power: Creates opportunities for mistaken identity, alibis, impersonation, emotional reveals, and inconvenient blame.
label: Identical Twin

text: Secretive Backstory — You have missing years, old enemies, and answers you refuse to give.
power: Adds hidden history, unresolved debts, mysterious contacts, and sudden plot hooks tied to the character’s past.
label: Secretive Backstory

text: Heavy Metal Musician — You can shred, scream, and turn taverns into riots or rituals.
power: Can rally crowds, distract enemies, impress rebels, annoy nobles, and turn dramatic moments into loud ones.
label: Heavy Metal Musician

text: Obsessive Fan — Someone adores you way too much and appears at inconvenient times.
power: An overenthusiastic admirer may provide rumors, gifts, access, distractions, or deeply awkward complications.
label: Obsessive Fan

text: Death Wish — You take reckless risks and somehow become very hard to intimidate.
power: Grants narrative nerve in dangerous scenes, making threats less effective while tempting bold, risky choices.
label: Death Wish

text: ADHD Spark — Your attention jumps fast, helping you notice unexpected details and improvise wildly.
power: Useful for chaotic problem-solving, rapid pivots, unusual connections, and spotting details others filter out.
label: ADHD Spark

text: Ritual Precision — You rely on strict habits, patterns, and checks that can reveal when something is wrong.
power: Helps notice tampering, broken routines, missing objects, altered rooms, and suspicious inconsistencies.
label: Ritual Precision

text: Lupus — A chronic condition that brings vulnerability, resilience, and story complications.
power: Adds realistic limits, medical needs, resilience under strain, and scenes where planning, care, and allies matter.
label: Lupus

text: Bad Luck Charm — Misfortune follows you, but it often hits everyone in the room.
power: Creates chaotic setbacks that may disrupt enemies, spoil plans, reveal secrets, or force unexpected choices.
label: Bad Luck Charm

text: Lucky Penny — You are slightly lucky in small, annoying, plot-relevant ways.
power: Tiny coincidences nudge events: a dropped key lands nearby, a guard sneezes, or the last door happens to be unlocked.
label: Lucky Penny

text: Minor Stage Magic — You know sleight of hand, misdirection, and theatrical distraction.
power: Useful for palming small objects, entertaining crowds, distracting guards, and making ordinary tricks look suspiciously mystical.
label: Minor Stage Magic

text: Streetwise — You know who to ask, where to hide, and when to run.
power: Helps navigate alleys, markets, taverns, gangs, rumors, shortcuts, and informal local rules.
label: Streetwise

text: Quiet Courage — You are not fearless, but you keep going anyway.
power: Provides steady resolve during fear, grief, pressure, or danger, especially when protecting someone or finishing a promise.
label: Quiet Courage

text: Plot Armor — You are a beloved character.
power: Nothing truly terrible can happen to you. Heaven forbid!
label: Plot Armor

text: They don't shake. Not from nerves, not from cold, not from things that should shake hands.
power: No penalty on fine manipulation under pressure. Once per scene, provide calm to an adjacent ally.
label: Steady Hands

text: They have learned to forget the right things. Selectively. On purpose.
power: Immune to forced memory extraction. Once per session, genuinely forget a specific fact to pass a truth check.
label: Selective Amnesia

text: Whatever just happened: they can do it again. Immediately. Before the moment closes.
power: Once per session, repeat any successful action or effect that just occurred. Circumstances must be plausible.
label: Recursion

text: They don't shake. Not from nerves, not from cold, not from things that should shake hands.
power: No penalty on fine manipulation under pressure. Once per scene, provide calm to an adjacent ally.
label: Steady Hands

text: They have learned to forget the right things. Selectively. On purpose.
power: Immune to forced memory extraction. Once per session, genuinely forget a specific fact to pass a truth check.
label: Selective Amnesia

text: Whatever just happened: they can do it again. Immediately. Before the moment closes.
power: Once per session, repeat any successful action or effect that just occurred. Circumstances must be plausible.
label: Recursion

text: They have learned to forget the right things. Selectively. On purpose.
power: Immune to forced memory extraction. Once per session, genuinely forget a specific fact to pass a truth check.
label: Selective Amnesia

text: They see shapes in things. The signature of repetition. Before the third time, they expect the fourth.
power: After two repetitions of any event or behaviour, identify the pattern. Ask the GM one question answered honestly.
label: Pattern Recognition

text: Every rule has an exception. They have found theirs and documented it.
power: Once per session, be exempt from one rule, law, effect, or narrative constraint. Declare before the check.
label: The Exception Clause
